sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111249" key="filokro/talos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-κρότᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111249.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving the</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κρόταλα, θυμέλαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.505.8</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
